title: crotalaria cytisoides
intro: Crotalaria cytisoides, also known as the yellow rattle, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria cytisoides include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antidote for certain poisonous substances. The herbal preparations of Crotalaria cytisoides typically involve the use of its leaves and roots, which are often brewed into teas or made into infusions.
